project.name: agent-platform
project.description: 企业级 Agent 平台 - Python 编排 + Java 核心服务

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.py) python -m py_compile "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || python3 -m py_compile "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 || echo 'SYNTAX_ERROR' ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.sql) grep -E '(DROP|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM audit)' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo '⚠️ DANGEROUS_SQL' || echo 'SQL_OK' ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.java) echo 'Java file - ensure Spring Boot conventions' ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in services/orchestrator-python/*.py|services/orchestrator-python/*/*.py|services/orchestrator-python/*/*/*.py) cd services/orchestrator-python && (uv run ruff check "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --fix 2>/dev/null || true) && (uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true) && echo '✅ Formatted' ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in services/model-gateway-python/*.py|services/model-gateway-python/*/*.py|services/model-gateway-python/*/*/*.py) cd services/model-gateway-python && (uv run ruff check "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --fix 2>/dev/null || true) && (uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true) && echo '✅ Formatted' ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in services/knowledge-python/*.py|services/knowledge-python/*/*.py|services/knowledge-python/*/*/*.py) cd services/knowledge-python && (uv run ruff check "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --fix 2>/dev/null || true) && (uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true) && echo '✅ Formatted' ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */test_*.py|test_*.py) echo '🧪 Test file created - run: make test' ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in services/*/graph/nodes/*.py) echo '🤖 LangGraph node - update graph/builder.py' ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in services/*/tools/*.py) echo '🔧 Tool created - register in tools/__init__.py' ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in contracts/proto/*.proto|contracts/proto/*/*.proto) buf lint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️ Proto lint issues' ;; esac
